languages.text: Эоганн Фебрус, проведя обряд коммуникации с авгурами, сопоставляет добытые машинным духом данные с собственными расчетами и поникает. Вознеся траурные молебны Богу-Машине, он говорит, что некогда именно это судно доставило его в Простор Коронус. До сего дня он не знал о постигшей его трагедии. Согласно его данным, оно принадлежало капитану-чартисту с довольно скрытной репутацией.

Upon conducting the rite of communion with the augurs, Eogunn Februs compares the machine spirit's findings with his own calculations. He finds the data disheartening and after offering up mourning prayers to the Machine God, he reveals that it was this very vessel that brought him to the Koronus Expanse. Until this day, he had remained ignorant of the tragedy that had befallen it. His data indicates it formerly belonged to a Chartist Captain whose background is shrouded in mystery.
languages.original_text: Эоганн Фебрус, проведя обряд коммуникации с авгурами, сопоставляет добытые машинным духом данные с собственными расчетами и поникает. Вознеся траурные молебны Богу-Машине, он говорит, что некогда именно это судно доставило его в Простор Коронус. До сего дня он не знал о постигшей его трагедии. Согласно его данным, оно принадлежало капитану-чартисту с довольно скрытной репутацией.

traits.locale_text: Upon conducting the rite of communion with the augurs, Eogunn Februs compares the machine spirit's findings with his own calculations. He finds the data disheartening and after raising mourning prayers to the Machine God, he reveals that this very vessel had once brought him to the Koronus Expanse. Until this day, he had remained ignorant of the tragedy that befell it. His data indicates it formerly belonged to a Chartist Captain of an exceptionally secretive reputation.

Until this day, he had remained ignorant of the tragedy that had befallen it. His data indicates it formerly belonged to a Chartist Captain whose background is shrouded in mystery.

Upon conducting the rite of communion with the augurs, Eogunn Februs compares the machine spirit's findings with his own calculations. He finds the data disheartening and after offering up mourning prayers to the Machine God, he reveals that it was this very vessel that brought him to the Koronus Expanse. Until this day, he had remained ignorant of the tragedy that had befallen it. His data indicates it formerly belonged to a Chartist Captain whose background is shrouded in mystery.

languages.text: Tras celebrar el rito de comunión con los augures, Eogunn Februs compara los hallazgos del espíritu máquina con sus propios cálculos. Los datos son poco esperanzadores y, tras una plegaria de luto al Dios Máquina, revela que fue esta misma nave la que lo trajo hasta la Extensión de Koronus. Hasta ahora, no se había enterado de la tragedia sufrida. Según sus datos, la nave pertenecía a un capitán cartista cuyo pasado es todo un misterio.
languages.original_text: Upon conducting the rite of communion with the augurs, Eogunn Februs compares the machine spirit's findings with his own calculations. He finds the data disheartening and after offering up mourning prayers to the Machine God, he reveals that it was this very vessel that brought him to the Koronus Expanse. Los datos son poco esperanzadores y, tras una plegaria de luto al Dios Máquina, revela que fue esta misma nave la que lo trajo hasta la Extensión de Koronus. languages.text: 在与俄歇矩阵进行交流仪式时，伊奥贡·费布鲁斯将机魂的调查结果与自己的计算结果进行了比对，最终结果令他十分沮丧。在向万机之神献上悼念祷词后，他透露，当年正是这艘船将他带到了科罗努斯扩区。直到今天，他才得知这艘船后来遭遇的悲剧。他的数据显示，这艘船曾属于一位背景神秘、身份成谜的宪章船长。
languages.original_text: Upon conducting the rite of communion with the augurs, Eogunn Februs compares the machine spirit's findings with his own calculations. He finds the data disheartening and after offering up mourning prayers to the Machine God, he reveals that it was this very vessel that brought him to the Koronus Expanse. Until this day, he had remained ignorant of the tragedy that had befallen it. His data indicates it formerly belonged to a Chartist Captain whose background is shrouded in mystery.

traits.locale_text: 在与俄歇矩阵进行交流仪式时，伊奥贡·费布鲁斯将机魂的调查结果与自己的计算结果进行了比对，最终结果令他十分沮丧。在向万机之神献上悼念祷词后，他透露，当年正是这艘船将他带到了科罗努斯扩区。直到今天，他才得知这艘船后来遭遇的悲剧。他的数据显示，这艘船曾属于一位背景神秘、身份成谜的宪章船长。

languages.text: Während er mit den Auguren den Ritus der Kommunion durchführte, verglich Eogunn Februs die Erkenntnisse des Maschinengeistes mit seinen eigenen Berechnungen. Er empfand die Daten als entmutigend und offenbarte nach einigen Trauergebeten an den Maschinengott, dass er mit genau diesem Schiff in die Koronus-Ausdehnung gekommen war. Bis zu diesem Tag hatte er die Tragödie ignoriert, die es befallen hatte. Laut seinen Daten gehörte es einst einem Chartistenkapitän mit einer geheimnisvollen Geschichte.
languages.original_text: Upon conducting the rite of communion with the augurs, Eogunn Februs compares the machine spirit's findings with his own calculations. He finds the data disheartening and after offering up mourning prayers to the Machine God, he reveals that it was this very vessel that brought him to the Koronus Expanse. Bis zu diesem Tag hatte er die Tragödie ignoriert, die es befallen hatte. Laut seinen Daten gehörte es einst einem Chartistenkapitän mit einer geheimnisvollen Geschichte.

languages.text: Alors qu'il mène le rite de communion avec les augures, Eogunn Februs compare les résultats de l'esprit de la machine à ses propres calculs. Les données semblent le peiner, et après avoir offert des prières de deuil au Dieu-Machine, il déclare que c'est ce vaisseau qui l'a amené aux Étendues de Koronus. Jusqu'à ce jour, il ignorait tout de son triste sort. Ses données indiquent qu'il appartenait autrefois à un capitaine cartographe aux origines mystérieuses.
languages.original_text: Upon conducting the rite of communion with the augurs, Eogunn Februs compares the machine spirit's findings with his own calculations. He finds the data disheartening and after offering up mourning prayers to the Machine God, he reveals that it was this very vessel that brought him to the Koronus Expanse. Until this day, he had remained ignorant of the tragedy that had befallen it. His data indicates it formerly belonged to a Chartist Captain whose background is shrouded in mystery.

languages.text: Alametlerle iletişim ayinini gerçekleştirdikten sonra Eogunn Februs, makine ruhunun bulgularını kendi hesaplamalarıyla karşılaştırıyor. Verileri cesaret kırıcı buluyor ve Makine Tanrı'ya yas duaları sunduktan sonra kendisini Koronus Enginliği'ne getiren geminin tam olarak bu olduğunu açıklıyor. Bugüne dek başına gelen trajediden habersizdi. Verileri, geminin eskiden geçmişi gizemle örtülü bir Haritacı Kaptan'a ait olduğunu gösteriyor.
languages.original_text: Upon conducting the rite of communion with the augurs, Eogunn Februs compares the machine spirit's findings with his own calculations. He finds the data disheartening and after offering up mourning prayers to the Machine God, he reveals that it was this very vessel that brought him to the Koronus Expanse. languages.text: エオグン・フェブルスは、神託者たちと共に行われた儀式の後、機械神からの結果と自身の計算を比較する。その結果に失望し、機械神に哀悼の祈りを捧げた後、彼はこの船が彼をコロナス・エクスパンションに導いたことを明かす。そして、この船がかつては謎に包まれた経歴を持つチャリストの船長に属していたことを明らかにする。
